title: LEVIATÁN takes down NRG 2-1 to secure playoff berth
description: The young LATAM squad wins out the Americas derby in London.

title: Proxh returns to Gentle Mates, replacing GLYPH
description: A familiar face returns to help Gentle Mates for the final stretch of 2026.

title: Team Vitality qualifies to playoffs, defeats FUT 2-1
description: Team Vitality repeated its upper bracket finals from the Stage 1 playoffs, defeating FUT Esports 2-1 and qualifying for the Masters London playoffs.

title: LEVIATÁN starts London campaign with 2-1 win over Global
description: The squad of four rookies took their first steps in London with a turnaround 2-1 victory over Pacific's dark horses.

title: FUT walks all over FULL SENSE in Masters debut
description: The young Turks on the block shock Pacific's number two with a stomp.

title: Team Vitality handily sweeps DRG at London
description: Team Vitality swept Dragon Ranger Gaming 2-0 in dominant fashion to begin both teams' runs at Masters London.

title: NRG opens Masters London with 2-0 win over XLG
description: An unreal performance from keiko led NRG to victory in the first match of Masters London.

title: Shopify Rebellion Gold's sarahcat retires from competitive play
description: After almost three years competing for the most prominent side in the Game Changers scene, sarahcat appears to have announced her retirement.
